---
title: "Week 3 --- NumPy for Economics"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 3 Overview

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---|---|---|
| Lecture 1 | Arrays & Vectorisation | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Linear Algebra with NumPy | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Statistical Operations | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |

::: {.callout-note}
Slides for this week are being prepared. Check back soon.
:::
